_comment: Edit this file to update your company's naming convention rules. No code changes needed.
capitalization: Brand names must be properly capitalized

remark_codes.OK: Entry is correct, no changes needed
remark_codes.Name corrected: Brand or fragrance name was fixed
remark_codes.Type corrected: X→Y: EDP/EDT type was wrong — e.g. Type corrected: EDT→EDP
remark_codes.Size corrected: Xml→Yml: Size/quantity was wrong — e.g. Size corrected: 100ml→50ml
remark_codes.Gender added: Gender was missing and has been determined
remark_codes.Not found — manual review: Product could not be verified online

search_fallback: general web search for fragrance details
